name: Conscript
description: The 'fighter' of Spheres of Might - Expert (full) combat talent progression, and its class skill list includes three additional skills of the player's choice at character creation.
source: Spheres of Might - full chassis verified against class reference table + wiki

name: Armiger
description: A weapon-focused martial who bonds with a customizable 'signature weapon' that adapts to whatever fighting style the player wants. Proficient (half) combat talent progression despite full BAB.
source: Spheres of Might - full chassis verified against class reference table + wiki

name: Blacksmith
description: A martial artisan who enhances allies' gear and breaks down enemy equipment, built around the Equipment sphere. Expert (full) combat talent progression, practitioner modifier fixed to Constitution.
source: Spheres of Might - full chassis verified against class reference table + wiki

name: Commander
description: A battlefield tactician built around the Warleader sphere. Adept (3/4) combat talent progression; practitioner modifier automatically uses whichever of Charisma or Intelligence is higher.
source: Spheres of Might - full chassis verified against class reference table + wiki

name: Savant
description: Officially a Thaumaturge (Spheres of Power) archetype, but replaces virtually every class feature - including BAB and saves - so it functions as a fully separate martial class here. Still qualifies for Thaumaturge-prerequisite feats. Proficient (half) combat talent progression.
source: Spheres of Might - full chassis verified against class reference table + wiki

name: Scholar
description: A knowledge-focused martial hybrid with the widest skill list of any Might class (8 + Int) and the only 1/2-BAB base class in the system. Proficient (half) combat talent progression, practitioner modifier fixed to Intelligence.
source: Spheres of Might - full chassis verified against class reference table + wiki

name: Sentinel
description: A defensive frontliner built around the Guardian sphere. The only d12 Hit Die class across both Power and Might. Expert (full) combat talent progression, practitioner modifier fixed to Wisdom.
source: Spheres of Might - full chassis verified against class reference table + wiki

name: Striker
description: A mobile, precision-focused martial who favors speed and decisive strikes. Expert (full) combat talent progression, practitioner modifier fixed to Constitution.
source: Spheres of Might - full chassis verified against class reference table + wiki

name: Technician
description: A gadgeteer solving problems with invented devices as much as weapons. Adept (3/4) combat talent progression, practitioner modifier fixed to Intelligence.
source: Spheres of Might - full chassis verified against class reference table + wiki
